apps.name: VS Code
install_methods: Manual install from official website or package manager
apps.description: General-purpose code editor.
config_notes: Install only the extensions you need for the selected workflow.
risk_notes: Too many extensions can slow startup or conflict with each other.

apps.name: Git
install_methods: Manual install from official website or package manager
apps.description: Distributed version control system.
config_notes: Configure user name, email, credential manager, and default branch policy.
risk_notes: Only clone repositories you trust and review scripts before running them.

apps.name: Python
install_methods: Manual install from official website, Microsoft Store, pyenv, or package manager
apps.description: Python runtime for development and automation.
config_notes: Use virtual environments per project to avoid dependency conflicts.
risk_notes: Avoid installing packages globally unless you understand the impact.

apps.name: Node.js
install_methods: Manual install from official website, nvm, fnm, or package manager
apps.description: JavaScript runtime for frontend and tooling workflows.
config_notes: Prefer an LTS release for starter environments.
risk_notes: Project dependency scripts should be reviewed before execution.

apps.name: pnpm
install_methods: Manual install using official pnpm instructions
apps.description: Fast disk-efficient JavaScript package manager.
config_notes: Enable Corepack if your Node.js workflow uses it.
risk_notes: Lockfiles should be committed for reproducible installs.

apps.name: Docker Desktop
install_methods: Manual install from Docker official website
apps.description: Container runtime and desktop management UI.
config_notes: Allocate conservative CPU, RAM, and disk limits on smaller PCs.
risk_notes: Containers consume disk and memory; review images before running them.

apps.name: WSL2 Ubuntu
install_methods: Manual setup using official Microsoft WSL documentation
apps.description: Ubuntu Linux environment on Windows through WSL2.
config_notes: Use WSL2 for Linux-native developer tooling when needed.
risk_notes: WSL setup changes Windows optional features and should be reviewed manually.

apps.name: Windows Terminal
install_methods: Manual install from Microsoft Store or official GitHub releases
apps.description: Modern terminal application for Windows shells.
config_notes: Pin commonly used shells such as PowerShell, Command Prompt, and WSL.
risk_notes: Shell profiles can run startup scripts; keep them simple and trusted.

apps.name: Cursor
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: AI-focused code editor.
config_notes: Configure model provider, privacy settings, and repository indexing intentionally.
risk_notes: Review privacy and data-sharing settings before use.

apps.name: Codex CLI
install_methods: Manual install using official documentation
apps.description: Command-line coding assistant workflow tool.
config_notes: Use project-level instructions and review generated diffs.
risk_notes: Do not run generated commands blindly.

apps.name: Continue
install_methods: Manual install from official extension marketplace or website
apps.description: Open-source AI coding assistant extension.
config_notes: Configure model endpoints and repository context carefully.
risk_notes: Review what code context is sent to external services.

apps.name: GitHub Copilot
install_methods: Manual install from official editor extension marketplace
apps.description: AI coding assistant from GitHub.
config_notes: Review organization policy and editor settings.
risk_notes: Generated code must be reviewed and tested.

apps.name: Browser
apps.official_source: Use an official browser source such as Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari.
install_methods: Use the system browser or install manually from an official source
apps.description: General web browser for AI tools, office apps, documentation, and downloads.
config_notes: Keep the browser updated and use separate profiles for work and personal accounts when helpful.
risk_notes: Review account, sync, extension, and privacy settings.

apps.name: ChatGPT
install_methods: Use the official web app or official desktop app
apps.description: General AI assistant for conversation, writing, learning, and workflows.
config_notes: Review memory, privacy, and data controls before using sensitive content.
risk_notes: AI answers can be wrong; verify important outputs.

apps.name: Claude
install_methods: Use the official web app or official desktop app
apps.description: AI assistant commonly used for long-form reading, writing, and analysis.
config_notes: Use project or chat organization to separate different work contexts.
risk_notes: Review privacy settings before uploading documents.

apps.name: Gemini
install_methods: Use the official web app
apps.description: Google AI assistant for web, productivity, and multimodal workflows.
config_notes: Check account and workspace data settings before use.
risk_notes: Generated content should be verified for accuracy.

apps.name: Perplexity
install_methods: Use the official web app
apps.description: AI search and answer tool with cited sources.
config_notes: Open cited sources for important claims.
risk_notes: Citations can still be incomplete or misinterpreted.

apps.name: Poe
install_methods: Use the official web app or official mobile app
apps.description: Multi-model AI chat platform.
config_notes: Compare model behavior with simple test prompts before relying on it.
risk_notes: Review each model's data and usage terms.

apps.name: ComfyUI
install_methods: Manual install from official repository instructions
apps.description: Node-based local AI image generation workflow tool.
config_notes: Keep models on an SSD and separate Python environments per AI tool.
risk_notes: Large model files consume significant disk space and VRAM.

apps.name: CUDA/PyTorch note
install_methods: Do not install automatically; review official CUDA/PyTorch compatibility guidance
apps.description: Compatibility note for matching GPU driver, CUDA runtime, and PyTorch builds.
config_notes: Use the official PyTorch selector and ComfyUI documentation before installing packages.
risk_notes: Wrong CUDA/PyTorch combinations can break local AI environments.

apps.name: Ollama
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Local model runner for supported LLMs.
config_notes: Start with smaller models on systems with limited RAM or VRAM.
risk_notes: Model files can be large and may run slowly on low-memory machines.

apps.name: LM Studio
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Desktop application for local LLM experimentation.
config_notes: Choose quantized models that fit available RAM and VRAM.
risk_notes: Large models can make the system unresponsive on underpowered PCs.

apps.name: llama.cpp
install_methods: Manual setup from official repository releases or build instructions
apps.description: Local inference project for GGUF language models.
config_notes: Use prebuilt binaries when available; build from source only when needed.
risk_notes: Build options and model formats can be confusing for beginners.

apps.name: Open WebUI
install_methods: Manual setup from official documentation
apps.description: Web interface for local model runners such as Ollama.
config_notes: Run only on trusted local networks unless you understand authentication and exposure risks.
risk_notes: Misconfigured services can expose local model endpoints.

apps.name: AnythingLLM
install_methods: Manual install from official website or official repository
apps.description: Local or self-hosted workspace-style LLM and knowledge base tool.
config_notes: Keep document workspaces scoped and review storage locations.
risk_notes: Sensitive documents should not be indexed without understanding storage and privacy settings.

apps.name: FFmpeg
install_methods: Manual install from official builds or package manager
apps.description: Media processing toolkit.
config_notes: Keep FFmpeg on PATH only if required by your workflow.
risk_notes: Complex command lines can overwrite files if used carelessly.

apps.name: Prism Launcher
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Minecraft launcher with instance and modpack management.
config_notes: Use separate instances for shader, modded, and vanilla profiles.
risk_notes: Only install mods from trusted sources.

apps.name: Fabric
install_methods: Manual setup through Fabric official installer or launcher integration
apps.description: Lightweight Minecraft mod loader.
config_notes: Match Fabric loader and mod versions to the Minecraft version.
risk_notes: Version mismatch can prevent Minecraft from launching.

apps.name: Iris Shaders
install_methods: Manual install from official source or mod platform
apps.description: Shader loader for modern Minecraft.
config_notes: Pair with Sodium for performance.
risk_notes: Shader presets can heavily impact frame rate.

apps.name: Sodium
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
apps.description: Minecraft rendering performance mod.
config_notes: Use as a base for performance-sensitive shader setups.
risk_notes: Check compatibility with other rendering mods.

apps.name: Lithium
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
apps.description: Minecraft game logic optimization mod.
config_notes: Keep mod versions aligned with your loader version.
risk_notes: Server and client mod compatibility should be checked.

apps.name: FerriteCore
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
apps.description: Minecraft memory optimization mod.
config_notes: Useful when running large modpacks on limited RAM.
risk_notes: Check compatibility notes for each Minecraft version.

apps.name: Distant Horizons
install_methods: Manual install from Modrinth or official project page
apps.description: Minecraft far-distance terrain rendering mod.
config_notes: Increase settings gradually and watch memory use.
risk_notes: High settings can consume substantial CPU, RAM, disk, and GPU resources.

apps.name: Modrinth App
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Minecraft mod and modpack manager.
config_notes: Use separate profiles for experiments.
risk_notes: Review mod permissions and sources.

apps.name: Steam
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: PC game store and library client.
config_notes: Place large game libraries on a disk with enough free space.
risk_notes: Downloads and shader caches can consume significant disk space.

apps.name: Epic Games Launcher
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: PC game store and launcher.
config_notes: Choose library locations intentionally.
risk_notes: Background launchers can consume startup resources.

apps.name: NVIDIA App
install_methods: Manual install from NVIDIA official website
apps.description: NVIDIA driver and settings companion app.
config_notes: Use official driver channels and avoid unnecessary overlays.
risk_notes: Driver updates should be reviewed for your hardware and games.

apps.name: MSI Afterburner
install_methods: Manual install from official MSI source
apps.description: GPU monitoring and tuning utility.
config_notes: Use monitoring features first; avoid overclocking unless experienced.
risk_notes: Incorrect tuning can reduce stability.

apps.name: CapFrameX
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Frame-time capture and analysis tool.
config_notes: Use for repeatable benchmark comparisons.
risk_notes: Benchmark overlays can affect measurements if configured poorly.

apps.name: RTSS
install_methods: Manual install, commonly bundled with MSI Afterburner
apps.description: RivaTuner Statistics Server overlay and frame limiter.
config_notes: Pair with MSI Afterburner for monitoring overlays; keep overlay minimal.
risk_notes: Overlays can conflict with some games or anti-cheat systems.

apps.name: Discord
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Voice and community chat client.
config_notes: Disable unnecessary startup and overlay options if performance is a concern.
risk_notes: Overlays and background activity can affect game performance.

apps.name: 7-Zip
install_methods: Manual install from official website or package manager
apps.description: File archiver for common compressed formats.
config_notes: Use for trusted archives and keep extracted files organized.
risk_notes: Do not run executables from unknown archives without checking the source.

apps.name: OBS Studio
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Open-source recording and streaming software.
config_notes: Use hardware encoding when available and test bitrates before recording important work.
risk_notes: High-resolution recording can consume disk and GPU resources quickly.

apps.name: DaVinci Resolve
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Video editing and color grading application.
config_notes: Place media cache on a fast disk with sufficient free space.
risk_notes: Low-RAM systems may struggle with high-resolution timelines.

apps.name: Audacity
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Audio recording and editing application.
config_notes: Set project sample rates intentionally for your workflow.
risk_notes: Always keep source audio backups before destructive edits.

apps.name: CapCut/Jianying
install_methods: Manual install from official source
apps.description: Video editing application for quick creator workflows.
config_notes: Review export settings and cloud features before use.
risk_notes: Cloud and account features may have privacy implications.

apps.name: HandBrake
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Graphical video transcoding tool.
config_notes: Use presets first, then adjust bitrate and codec settings carefully.
risk_notes: Aggressive compression can reduce output quality.

apps.name: Krita
install_methods: Manual install from official website or store
apps.description: Digital painting and image creation application.
config_notes: Configure tablet input and brush presets for your workflow.
risk_notes: Large canvases can use substantial RAM.

apps.name: Blender
install_methods: Manual install from official website or package manager
apps.description: 3D modeling, animation, rendering, and compositing suite.
config_notes: Check GPU rendering settings and cache locations before large projects.
risk_notes: Rendering can consume significant CPU, GPU, RAM, and disk resources.

apps.name: Google Chrome
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Chromium-based browser commonly used for web apps and office workflows.
config_notes: Review sync, profile, extension, and privacy settings.
risk_notes: Too many extensions can affect security and performance.

apps.name: Microsoft Edge
install_methods: Usually included with Windows or manual install from Microsoft
apps.description: Microsoft browser integrated with Windows and Microsoft accounts.
config_notes: Review sync, sidebar, extension, and account settings.
risk_notes: Enterprise or school accounts may apply policies.

apps.name: WPS Office or Microsoft Office note
apps.official_source: Use official WPS Office or Microsoft Office sources based on your license.
install_methods: Manual install only after choosing the licensed office suite
apps.description: Reminder to choose an office suite based on license, compatibility, and collaboration needs.
config_notes: Confirm file compatibility and account requirements before standardizing on one suite.
risk_notes: Avoid unofficial installers and cracked office suites.

apps.name: Obsidian
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Local Markdown note-taking and knowledge base application.
config_notes: Keep vaults backed up and review community plugins before enabling them.
risk_notes: Untrusted plugins can affect local files.

apps.name: Notion
install_methods: Use official web app or desktop app
apps.description: Online workspace for notes, docs, databases, and collaboration.
config_notes: Use workspaces and permissions deliberately.
risk_notes: Sensitive documents depend on cloud account and sharing settings.

apps.name: Zotero
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Reference manager for papers, citations, and research materials.
config_notes: Configure browser connector and storage/sync settings intentionally.
risk_notes: Large libraries and PDFs can consume sync storage.

apps.name: Snipaste
install_methods: Manual install from official website or store
apps.description: Screenshot and pin-to-screen utility.
config_notes: Configure hotkeys to avoid conflicts with other screenshot tools.
risk_notes: Screenshots can contain sensitive information.

apps.name: ShareX
install_methods: Manual install from official website or store
apps.description: Advanced screenshot, screen recording, and workflow automation tool.
config_notes: Review upload destinations and automation actions before use.
risk_notes: Misconfigured upload actions can share sensitive screenshots.

apps.name: SumatraPDF
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Lightweight PDF and document reader for Windows.
config_notes: Use as a fast reader alongside a full PDF editor if needed.
risk_notes: Use current versions for safer document handling.

apps.name: Everything
install_methods: Manual install from official website
apps.description: Fast local file search utility for Windows.
config_notes: Limit indexes if privacy or performance requirements demand it.
risk_notes: Search indexes can reveal filenames on shared machines.

apps.name: PowerToys
install_methods: Manual install from Microsoft Store, GitHub, or winget
apps.description: Microsoft utility suite for advanced Windows productivity.
config_notes: Enable only modules you actually use, such as FancyZones or PowerToys Run.
risk_notes: Global hotkeys can conflict with existing workflows.
